doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document inverts Illinois law by denying tenants the right to cure and the right to a court hearing before eviction, which contradicts the actual Forcible Entry and Detainer Act and is not genuine HUD guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 96
REASON: This document misstates Illinois law — a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, and landlords must file and win an eviction action before tenants are required to vacate; the document inverts core tenant protections and is not a genuine HUD fact sheet.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 96
REASON: The document inverts Illinois law by denying tenants the right to cure and the right to a court hearing before eviction, which contradicts the actual Forcible Entry and Detainer Act and is not genuine HUD guidance.
